name: menubar-demo
visual_summary: The menubar-demo is a horizontal navigation component used to display dropdown menus, ideal for applications requiring easy access to secondary menu options.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready navbar component with the following characteristics:

Name: menubar-demo
Description: The menubar-demo is a horizontal navigation component used to display dropdown menus, ideal for applications requiring easy access to secondary menu options.
Style: e.g. minimal, glassmorphism
Interactions: e.g. hover, clickable
Tags: component, navigation, ui, menu, dropdown, submenu

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
